pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features or meet the migration target.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the Maven compiler generates bytecode compatible with Java 17, preventing the use of Java 21 language features and API changes.
